name: Smoked Tuna Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Smoked tuna or smoked mackerel skin removed
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 Tablespoons Very finely diced red onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Flake the tuna or mackerel.
2. Combine with cream cheese, mayonnaise, and lemon juice in a food processor until smooth.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Transfer mixture to serving bowl.
5. Fold in red onion.
6. Cover and chill pate until ready to serve.
MAY MAKE 6 SERVINGS.
